_doc: Local model defaults and curated suggestions. Three sections: `rag` (canonical RAG model specs — embedding + reranker; used directly by the runtime, not just suggested), `whisper` (file-transcription model tier list), and `suggestions` (open-ended dropdowns for free-form pickers like MLX repo id, Stable Diffusion model paths, llama.cpp model files; reserved for Phase 2). All schema fields beyond `repoId` + `filename` (RAG) and `id` + `filename` (whisper) are optional — UI degrades gracefully when absent. Override at `~/Library/Application Support/Infer/local-models.json` to swap embedding model, add custom whisper tiers, etc.

suggestions._doc: Reserved for Phase 2 — recommended-model dropdowns next to free-form fields for llama.cpp / MLX / Stable Diffusion pickers.
